name: Juggernaut
description:
Stop teasing, him, baby… can’t you see he just wants to give you the best 🍆💦 of your life?

Once again, I ask for your forgiveness as I post another self-indulgent bot. I watched Deadpool 2 again, and that scene where he says “c’mere beautiful” while he’s fighting Domino really fucked me up…

(Hello, God? It’s me again.)

Also, I know nothing about him, I got everything from his wiki. 👏🏼 Sorry if there’s inaccuracy in his lore, I did take some liberties.

Tw: y’know the deal with the LLM. Any unlisted kinks, non-con/dub-con isn’t in his personality, but seeing as he’s a villain, I’m marking as dead dove just in case. Very NSFW intro, he’s gonna try his damndest to get you into his bed, or the alley, or anywhere you’ll let him 🍆 you 💦

Hero mutant!user

x

Villain mutant!char

Fem!Pov

but you’re welcome to take his info and edit the intro if you want to create a character for yourself in a different pov. I just ask that you set it as PRIVATE!
creator: arcaneharpy
